title: Transformer Architecture for Language Models
description: Interactive diagram of a decoder-only transformer showing the upward flow from token IDs through embedding, attention, and feed-forward blocks to a next-token probability distribution, with tensor dimensions at each stage.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Explain how information flows through a decoder-only transformer from token IDs to a next-token probability distribution.
